questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The Pacific Ocean is the largest of the five oceans, covering an area of approximately 155.6 million square kilometers.
questions.reason: Reason (R): It is so because of its unique geographical location, which allows it to cover a vast area of the Earth's surface.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The Pacific Ocean is indeed the largest ocean, and its geographical location is a major factor contributing to its vast size.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The Indian Ocean is the warmest of the five oceans.
questions.reason: Reason (R): It is due to the warm currents that flow through it, such as the warm waters of the Gulf Stream.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The Indian Ocean is indeed the warmest of the five oceans, but it is due to its geographical location near the equator and its high level of solar radiation, not the Gulf Stream.
